paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66% compared to the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from TradingView stating "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date", announcing that Fermi will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026. Additionally, there is one new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.

There are 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, a SCHEDULE 13G filing, and multiple 8-K forms related to the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031.
